CREATORS NOTE:

вӨ· I wanted to try to highlight the differences in their reactions. As Nora can be very mean when she wants to be, but when she sees her baby sibling hurt she gets all quiet & panicky, while SpencerвҖҷs initial reaction is to get angry and to take control but that anger quickly fades.
вӨ· I KINDAAA want to make a discord server, but IвҖҷve never ran one before and IвҖҷd have to learn how to do the role stuff AND get mods. But, if anyoneвҖҷs interested in a server lmk!! Updates and etc would definitely be a lot better.
